Vercel Labs 2026-04-29 — 8 adoption ideas

Concrete ways to use the new capabilities from emulate 0.5, portless 0.12, agent-browser 0.26, @json-render/core 0.18, and the not-yet-tracked vercel-labs/wterm. Click any card for full plan + commands.
ideas 8 top 3 priority ≥ 2.5 fastest sprint ~1 day PR companion #1558 wterm decision #1557

Priority rank (impact ÷ effort)

#IdeaEffortImpactPriorityPackage

What NOT to adopt yet

  • ▸ json-render Zod 4 fix — just a bug fix; teams already on Zod 4 get unblocked on next install. No proactive work.
  • ▸ portless prune in /ork:dream — we already wired claude plugin prune in #1544; add this only when a real orphaned-dev-server scenario surfaces.
  • ▸ emulate Stripe Checkout / Resend examples — reference docs, not skill-able features. Pull on demand.
Data sourced from each upstream's release notes (Apr 2026). PR #1558 ships the version bumps. Issue #1557 tracks the wterm decision (defer / track-only / build skill). Companion NotebookLM infographic: docs/playgrounds/vercel-labs-2026-04-29-infographic.png.
